explanation_en: IC (Information Coefficient) = how well this indicator predicts future returns. Range: -1 to +1. Our IC is NEGATIVE because it works as a contrarian signal — when retail is greedy (high score), markets tend to fall. IC of -0.175 means: the more greedy retail investors are, the worse future returns tend to be. All 5 markets statistically significant (p < 0.0001).
explanation_tw: IC（資訊係數）= 這個指標預測未來報酬的能力。範圍 -1 到 +1。我們的 IC 是負數，因為這是反向指標——散戶越貪婪（分數越高），市場未來表現越差。IC = -0.175 代表：散戶越貪婪，未來報酬越低。5 個市場全部統計顯著（p < 0.0001）。

what_ic_means_en.ic_above_neg_015: Strong contrarian signal — high confidence the indicator works
what_ic_means_en.ic_neg_005_to_neg_015: Moderate signal — indicator has predictive value
what_ic_means_en.ic_near_zero: Weak or no signal — indicator may not be useful for this horizon
what_ic_means_en.negative_ic: Negative IC is GOOD for a contrarian indicator — it means high greed predicts low returns

what_ic_means_tw.ic_above_neg_015: 強反向信號——高度信心指標有效
what_ic_means_tw.ic_neg_005_to_neg_015: 中等信號——指標有預測價值
what_ic_means_tw.ic_near_zero: 弱信號——此時間範圍可能無效
what_ic_means_tw.negative_ic: 負 IC 對反向指標是好事——代表散戶貪婪時未來報酬確實較低
